title: NMRIH Zombie Sounds
description: Replaces the default Minecraft zombie SFX with the zombie sounds from No More Room In Hell
body:
this resource pack replaces every **zombie-humanoid's** sounds with the zombie sounds from [No More Room In Hell](https://store.steampowered.com/app/224260/No_More_Room_in_Hell/) in order to atleast slightly change how zombies come off as enemies

credits go to the creators of no more room in hell
